message:
fix(engine): numeric safety, overflow-safe arithmetic, and correctness fixes

execution_cell:
- saturating_add for event_sequence counter

catastrophe_witness_generator:
- Fix integer_sqrt_i128: replace (x+1)/2 with (x/2)+(x%2) to avoid
  overflow on i128::MAX (the addition would wrap)

hybrid_lane_router:
- Enrichment integration test additions

module_cache, s3_fifo_cache_gate, safe_mode_fallback:
- Numeric safety and bounds checking improvements

proof_obligations, scheduler_invariants:
- Correctness refinements

seqlock_fastpath:
- Additional safety improvements

object_model, ir_contract, runtime_diagnostics_cli:
- Error handling and validation improvements

Tests:
- hybrid_lane_router, PIC, control_plane_benchmark enrichment tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
